name: Mem0 (open memory layer)
context_primitives: OSS + hosted platform that extracts salient memories from conversations, consolidates, and retrieves relevant snippets for later turns—explicitly targeting token reduction versus stuffing full history. Paper positions against full-context and OpenAI Memory-style baselines on long-dialog evaluations.
deployment_pattern: pip/npm SDK calls before each LLM invocation; optional hosted Mem0 cloud; integrates with common agent stacks.
benchmarks_eval_alignment: arXiv:2504.19413 reports strong gains vs. baselines on long-dialog tasks (e.g., LOCOMO comparisons in paper); headline percentages are vendor/paper claims—reproduce on private transcripts.
ecosystem_integrations: Framework-agnostic; docs and AGENTS.md in repo for contributor flows.
differentiators: Apache-2.0 self-host path plus managed cloud; focuses on memory API rather than full agent IDE.
significance_for_builders: Good default when you need **user-specific** recall across sessions without building extraction + reranking yourself.
key_timeline_or_milestones: Paper Mem0: Building Production-Ready AI Agents with Scalable Long-Term Memory (arXiv:2504.19413).
